transcript_facts:
- [Findings] let's uh , let's look at your x-ray . show me the last radiograph . so this is looking at your right arm , and what i see is a proximal humerus fracture .
- [Findings] so your exam is generally normal , meaning that the rest of your body is normal
- [Findings] you've got normal pulses , and everything else is normal .
- [Findings] um , so what we're going to have to do- the good thing about um , these kinds of fractures is generally , they will heal up without surgery .
- [History of Present Illness] so severe right upper arm pain .
- [History of Present Illness] in severe pain . have you taken anything for the pain ? i've been taking ibuprofen every six hours i think , but it's really not helping at all .
- [History of Present Illness] i have gallstones .
- [History of Present Illness] pepcid . and any surgeries in the past ? yes , i had a lumbar fusion about six years ago .
- [History of Present Illness] but you've got some swelling and erythema-
- [History of Present Illness] you've got uh , tenderness over your right shoulder . any numbness or tingling in that right arm ?
- [History of Present Illness] um , but we have to put you in a sling that weighs your arm down and pulls it down . so we're going to put you in a long arm cast and a sling , and then we're gon na check you in two weeks to see if those bones have realigned and if they have n't , then we're gon na have to talk about doing surgery at that time .
- [History of Present Illness] we'll do lortab 500- lortab 5 milligram . um , you can take one to two tablets every uh , six hours as needed for pain .
- [History of Present Illness] and um , do you have any allergies to medicines ? no , i do n't have no allergies .
- [History of Present Illness] why do n't you come with me , we'll get the tech to put the cast on .
- [Plan] i'm going to prescribe you some pain medicine .
- [Plan] um , hey dragon , go ahead and order any medications or procedures discussed .
